description_long: This potted plant features lush, broad green leaves arranged in a dense, cascading pattern, with several large, vibrant pink hibiscus-like flowers emerging from the upper stems. The flowers have prominent central stamens and delicate petals, adding a striking contrast to the deep green foliage. The leaves are heart-shaped and layered, creating a full, bushy appearance. The stems are slender and upright, supporting the weight of the foliage and blooms. There is no visible pot or container, as the foliage and flowers dominate the visual presentation. The plant exudes a tropical, ornamental vibe, suitable for decorative use in urban environments.
description: A lush, bushy potted plant with broad green leaves and large pink hibiscus-like flowers, featuring prominent central stamens and dense foliage.
description_view_0: Three large pink flowers and dense green leaves are visible, with the flowers facing slightly upward and outward.
description_view_1: The plant is seen more from the side, showing the cascading arrangement of leaves and the profile of the flowers.
description_view_2: A frontal view highlights the three prominent pink flowers and the symmetrical spread of the foliage.
description_view_3: The flowers are viewed from the side, with more leaves visible and the blooms partially turned away.
